Sentence.title: Sentence
Sentence.description: A parallel sentence entry in three languages with word alignment.

bookId.description: ID of the book section (e.g., sozler)

ottoman.description: Array of words in Ottoman Turkish

wordMap.description: Array of objects mapping indexes between languages
